description: Research npm packages by metadata, downloads, maintainers, freshness, and dependency risk.

tools.name: downloads_get
tools.description: Gets the downloads per day for a given period for all packages. Required: period. Returns the RegistryDownloads.

tools.name: downloads_get-point
tools.description: Gets the downloads per day for a given period for a specific package. Required: period, packageName. Returns the PackageDownloads.

tools.name: downloads_get-range
tools.description: Gets the downloads per day for a given period for all packages. Required: period. Returns the DailyRegistryDownloads.

tools.name: downloads_get-range-2
tools.description: Gets the downloads per day for a given period for a specific package. Required: period, packageName. Returns the DailyPackageDownloads.

tools.name: versions_last-week_get
tools.description: Download count for specific versions of a package. It's only available for the previous 7 days. Note: for scoped packages, the `/` needs to be percent encoded. (`@slack/client` -> `@slack%2Fclient`). Required: packageName. Returns the PackageVersionsDownloadCount.
